cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which present after all these swaps. There are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me jot down the initial assignments first. Initially: - Alice has brown present. - Bob has orange ball. - Claire has green present. - Dave has blue present. - Eve has white present. Now, there are five swaps happening in sequence. Let me track each swap step by step. First swap: Eve and Bob swap their gifts. So before this swap: - Eve has white, Bob has orange.
